hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r FILE; [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ "$FILE" = "null" ] && exit 0; CD=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$CD"; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] && exit 0; REL=$(realpath --relative-to="$(pwd)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "$FILE"); git add "$REL"; git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; EXT="${REL##*.}"; case "$EXT" in md) PFX="docs";; test.*|spec.*) PFX="test";; json) PFX="chore";; *) PFX="feat";; esac; git commit -m "${PFX}: update ${REL}"; git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
